ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, DEBRA DIXION
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, JOHN H. AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, DEBRA DIXION BROWN, MAKIBA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, DEBRA DIXION BROWN, MAKIBA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1006 HOLLISTER AVE, LOWER UNIT, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL MAY-31-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 5-31-94. NO FURTHER STAYS ON EVICTION. DEF. WARRANTS SHE IS SOLE OCCUPANT & NO OTHER PERSON HAS RIGHT OF POSSESSION. PERS. PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED. SEC. DEPOSIT RETAINED BY PL. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, JOHN H. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-27-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAY-04-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. PL. PRESENT W/MICHAEL ROSSOFF AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP. FOR PL. ENTRY OF JUDGMENT OR DISMISSAL W/PREJUDICE. DEF. AGREES TO VACATE 1006 HOLLISTER AVE, S.F, CA. BY 7-27-94 - IF DEF. DOES VACATE ALL RENT & DAMAGES ARE WVD, PL. WILL VACATE DEFAULT OF MAKIBA BROWN & WILL DISM ENTIRE ACTION W/PREJUDICE - EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR COSTS & FEES - PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED - MUTUTAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS - IF DEF. DOESN'T VACATE BY 7-27-94, PL. MAY HAVE JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION & RENT & DAMAGES BY EXPARTE APPL. TO THE COURT & WITH 24 HR TELEPHONIC NOTICE TO DEF. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE DOCUMENTS.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, JOHN H. SERVED APR-09-1994, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, MAKIBA DOES 1 TO 10
